channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: NYSC Members Struggle with High Living Costs in Abuja
item.description: NYSC members in Abuja are facing severe financial challenges due to skyrocketing living costs. Despite hoping for better career opportunities, many find their monthly allowance of N77,000 insufficient...

item.title: Critics Call for Roberto Martinez's Removal After Portugal's World Cup Exit
item.description: The article discusses the controversy surrounding Roberto Martinez's decision to field Cristiano Ronaldo in Portugal's World Cup campaign, leading to the team's early exit. Former USMNT star Mike Grel...

item.title: Canadian Astronaut Jeremy Hansen Announces Retirement from Space Agency After Moon Mission
item.description: Astronaut Jeremy Hansen, who recently completed a historic lunar mission as part of Artemis II, has announced his retirement from the Canadian Space Agency (CSA). The CSA confirmed Monday that Hansen ...

item.title: Investigations into World Cup Corruption and Political Allegations
item.description: The article discusses ongoing investigations into corruption allegations surrounding the 2026 FIFA World Cup, focusing on political figures such as Sam Liccardo, a California official, and potential t...

item.title: News Corp Australia blocks access for non-crawler bots
item.description: The article explains that News Corp Australia has implemented software to manage crawler bot traffic on its websites. If a user is not a crawler bot but encounters a block message, they are advised to...

item.title: Belgium take early lead against U.S. as Balogun returns after FIFA overturns suspension
item.description: The FIFA World Cup Round of 16 match between the United States and Belgium began amid significant controversy after FIFA allowed U.S. striker Folarin Balogun to play despite his earlier red-card suspe...

item.title: Master Hanz Cua's Feng Shui Insights for July 7, 2026
item.description: The article discusses the feng shui predictions by Master Hanz Cua for July 7, 2026, as featured in ABS-CBN Lifestyle. The piece highlights the expert's insights into energy flow and auspicious arrang...

item.title: USA face Belgium in World Cup last-16 tie amid controversy over Balogun's reinstatement
item.description: The live coverage previews the 2026 FIFA World Cup last-16 match between the United States and Belgium in Seattle, with much of the build-up dominated by controversy surrounding Folarin Balogun's elig...

item.title: News Outlet Mistakenly Publishes Article on Mitch McConnell's Death, Later Retracted
item.description: The article discusses a significant error by The Hill, which prematurely published an article about Senator Mitch McConnell's death, intended to be embargoed until his condition was confirmed. McConne...

item.title: South Africa's Rooftop Solar Capacity Surpasses 8.3 GW Amid Energy Transition
item.description: South Africa's rooftop solar capacity has surpassed 8.3 GW, driven by declining costs, Eskom tariff hikes, and shifting energy dynamics. The growth, initially spurred by load shedding, continues as ho...

item.title: Study highlights E20 fuel's impact on rubber parts and engine durability in E10 vehicles
item.description: A study by the Automotive Research Association of India (ARAI) revealed that using E20 fuel in E10-compliant vehicles may cause deterioration in rubber components like hoses, gaskets, and seals. While...

item.title: Cristiano Ronaldo Reacts to Portugal's World Cup Exit and Announces Retirement
item.description: Cristiano Ronaldo has shared his thoughts after Portugal's exit from the 2026 FIFA World Cup, where they lost 1-0 to Spain in the Round of 16. Despite scoring three goals across the tournament, Ronald...

item.title: Daycare worker faces lawsuit after allegedly causing traumatic brain injury to toddler by tossing him into the air
item.description: A 23-month-old toddler suffered severe injuries, including a traumatic brain injury and hearing loss, after being tossed into the air and dropped by a daycare worker at The Bay Club Clubhouse in El Se...

item.title: DOH warns against misinterpreting Quezon City's 265% COVID-19 rise
item.description: The Department of Health (DOH) has called for caution in interpreting recent data showing a 265% surge in COVID-19 cases in Quezon City, emphasizing that the percentage increase does not reflect the a...

item.title: NATO Warns Against Naivety on China Amid South Pacific Missile Launch
item.description: NATO Secretary-General Mark Rutte has warned that Western nations cannot ignore China's growing military assertiveness, citing a recent test of a long-range nuclear-capable ballistic missile launched ...

item.title: Tamara Lich, Convoy Leader, Attends U.S. Ambassador's July 4 Event Amid Legal Proceedings
item.description: Tamara Lich, the leader of the 2022 Ottawa convoy protests, attended an official Independence Day event at the U.S. ambassador's residence in Ottawa, requiring special permission due to her conditiona...

item.title: Spain advances to World Cup quarters with last-minute goal against Portugal
item.description: In a tightly contested World Cup last-16 clash, Spain secured a 1-0 victory over Portugal with a last-minute goal from substitute Mikel Merino, sending them to the quarterfinals. The decisive strike c...

item.title: England's historic World Cup win and the celebrations that followed
item.description: England's men's football team secured a historic victory in the World Cup, marking their best performance since 1966. The triumph, achieved against a formidable opponent, was celebrated across the nat...

item.title: Two Assam Rifles personnel killed in Manipur ambush; security forces respond
item.description: Two Assam Rifles personnel were killed in an ambush by suspected militants on NH-202 in Manipur's Ukhrul district on Monday afternoon. The attack occurred around 2pm when a group of 40 Assam Rifles pe...

item.title: Family mourns missing gospel singer after 26 years
item.description: The article details the ongoing grief of a Nigerian gospel musician's family, who have been searching for answers about his disappearance since November 2000. The son, now a successful artist himself,...
